ETH_UCY.caveat: Train-fitted shape gain/harm gate uses future waypoint labels only during training/validation. Inference remains past-only and protected by endpoint bridge/floor fallback. Dataset-local raw-frame 2.5D only; no Stage5C/SMC/metric/seconds claim.

TrajNet.caveat: Train-fitted shape gain/harm gate uses future waypoint labels only during training/validation. Inference remains past-only and protected by endpoint bridge/floor fallback. Dataset-local raw-frame 2.5D only; no Stage5C/SMC/metric/seconds claim.
